text.title: RACI AI Assisted Decision Tree
text.summary: Tree mapping observable signals (trigger validity, owner named, A-count per row, evidence presence, staleness) to scaffold / suppress / repair / refresh.

conclusion.verdict: skip-this-methodology — refuse vague triggers; named cadence only

branch.question: header.owner.person populated AND in stakeholder register?

conclusion.verdict: defer; resolve PM ownership before scaffold
refresh: run quarterly review before scaffold

branch.question: every row has exactly one accountable role + ≥1 evidence anchor?

conclusion.verdict: repair: rerun assign-A; reject rows with missing or duplicate A; require evidence per row
publish RACIMatrix per fixed schema; notify roster

text.example: trigger=roster_delta → owner=pm-handle → last_reviewed=2026-05-10 (fresh) → every row has 1 A + evidence → publish.
